name: Suspicious Execution of LNK File
description: Detects the execution of suspicious LNK files that spawn PowerShell or command prompt and have high entropy in the command field.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: process_guid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the spawned process (cmd.exe or powershell.exe).

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was created.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the spawned process (cmd.exe or powershell.exe).

parameters.name: parent_process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process, which should be 'explorer.exe'.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line of the spawned process.

parameters.name: command_entropy
parameters.description: The calculated entropy of the command line, indicating randomness (should be greater than 5).
